name: Chalkis Health Industry Co., Ltd
summary: Chalkis Health Industry Co., Ltd. produces, processes, and sells tomatoes worldwide. It offers tomato paste concentrated in drums and wooden bins, peeled and diced tomatoes, canned tomato products, tomato fiber sheets, and tomato seed oil, as well as lycopene capsules. The company was formerly known as Xinjiang Chalkis Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Chalkis Health Industry Co., Ltd. in May 2016. Chalkis Health Industry Co., Ltd. is based in Urumqi, China.
